title: Custom Mining
description: A comprehensive Minecraft plugin that implements a custom mining system with configurable block toughness, mining speeds, and custom drops. Built for Paper/Spigot 1.21+.
body:
This plugin just provide a custom block toughness for block and mining speed for items, which you can configure them in the config. Also support custom drop for blocks.

---
* Required **ProtocolLib**
* Only support 1.21+, as this plugin used new feature in 1.21.

Q&A
---
**Plugin won't load:**
- Ensure ProtocolLib is installed and compatible
- Check server version compatibility (1.21+)

**Mining not working:**
- Check that blocks are configured in `config.yml`
- Ensure player is in Survival mode
- Verify tool configuration
